definition: A broad issue need goal or pressure motivating computational work.
A bounded computable version of the concern defined through inputs outputs constraints states assumptions and objectives.
A sequence of operations that transforms inputs into outputs.
Data parameters states or events supplied to a procedure.
The result returned by a procedure.
A rule that limits feasible actions outputs or states.
A representation of the system at a moment or step.
A rule determining when the procedure should end.
Risk introduced when the formal problem diverges from the real-world concern in important ways.
